tZh: 缩放与评估稀疏自编码器
sEn: We propose using k-sparse autoencoders to directly control sparsity, find clean scaling laws, and introduce new metrics for evaluating feature quality.
sZh: 我们提出使用k-稀疏自编码器直接控制稀疏性，发现清晰的缩放规律，并引入评估特征质量的新指标。
absEn: Sparse autoencoders provide a promising unsupervised approach for extracting interpretable features from a language model by reconstructing activations from a sparse bottleneck layer. Since language models learn many concepts, autoencoders need to be very large to recover all relevant features. However, studying the properties of autoencoder scaling is difficult due to the need to balance reconstruction and sparsity objectives and the presence of dead latents. We propose using k-sparse autoencoders [Makhzani and Frey, 2013] to directly control sparsity, simplifying tuning and improving the reconstruction-sparsity frontier. Additionally, we find modifications that result in few dead latents, even at the largest scales we tried. Using these techniques, we find clean scaling laws with respect to autoencoder size and sparsity. We also introduce several new metrics for evaluating feature quality based on the recovery of hypothesized features, the explainability of activation patterns, and the sparsity of downstream effects. These metrics all generally improve with autoencoder size. To demonstrate the scalability of our approach, we train a 16 million latent autoencoder on GPT-4 activations for 40 billion tokens. We release training code and autoencoders for open-source models, as well as a visualizer.
absZh: 稀疏自编码器通过从稀疏瓶颈层重建激活，提供了一种有前景的无监督方法，用于从语言模型中提取可解释特征。由于语言模型学习众多概念，自编码器需要非常大才能恢复所有相关特征。然而，由于需要平衡重建和稀疏性目标以及存在死亡潜在单元，研究自编码器缩放特性很困难。我们提出使用k-稀疏自编码器[Makhzani and Frey, 2013]直接控制稀疏性，简化调优并改善重建-稀疏性前沿。此外，我们发现了即使在尝试的最大规模下也能导致很少死亡潜在单元的修改。利用这些技术，我们发现了关于自编码器大小和稀疏性的清晰缩放规律。我们还引入了几个基于假设特征恢复、激活模式可解释性和下游效应稀疏性的新指标来评估特征质量。这些指标通常随自编码器大小增加而改善。为了展示我们方法的可扩展性，我们在GPT-4激活上训练了一个1600万潜在单元的自编码器，处理了400亿个token。我们发布了训练代码和开源模型的自编码器，以及一个可视化工具。

contrib.en: Propose k-sparse autoencoders with TopK activation to directly control sparsity, simplifying tuning and improving reconstruction-sparsity frontier.
contrib.zh: 提出使用TopK激活函数的k稀疏自编码器直接控制稀疏性，简化调参并改善重建-稀疏性前沿。

contrib.en: Identify modifications (encoder initialized to decoder transpose, auxiliary loss) that result in few dead latents even at largest scales.
contrib.zh: 发现修改方法（编码器初始化为解码器转置、辅助损失）即使在最大规模下也能减少死亡潜变量。

contrib.en: Demonstrate clean scaling laws for autoencoder size and sparsity, and train a 16 million latent autoencoder on GPT-4 activations.
contrib.zh: 展示自编码器规模和稀疏性的清晰缩放定律，并在GPT-4激活上训练1600万潜变量的自编码器。

contrib.en: Introduce new metrics for feature quality: probe loss, explainability (N2G), ablation sparsity, and downstream loss.
contrib.zh: 引入新的特征质量指标：探针损失、可解释性（N2G）、消融稀疏性和下游损失。

contrib.en: Show that larger autoencoders generally improve on all proposed quality metrics.
contrib.zh: 表明更大的自编码器通常在所有提出的质量指标上表现更好。

contrib.en: Release training code, autoencoders for open-source models, and a feature visualizer.
contrib.zh: 发布训练代码、开源模型的自编码器以及特征可视化工具。

limits.en: TopK forces exactly k active latents per token, which may be suboptimal; expected L0 constraint might be better.
limits.zh: TopK强制每个词元恰好k个活跃潜变量，可能次优；期望L0约束可能更好。

limits.en: Metrics like probe loss and explainability rely on assumptions about natural features and may not capture all aspects.
limits.zh: 探针损失和可解释性等指标依赖于对自然特征的假设，可能无法捕捉所有方面。

limits.en: N2G explanations are limited to simple n-gram patterns and cannot capture complex feature interactions.
limits.zh: N2G解释仅限于简单的n-gram模式，无法捕捉复杂的特征交互。

limits.en: Training uses only 64-token context, potentially insufficient for capturing long-range behaviors in GPT-4.
limits.zh: 训练仅使用64词元上下文，可能不足以捕捉GPT-4中的长程行为。

limits.en: Scaling laws may break at extreme scales due to sublinear token budget per latent.
limits.zh: 缩放定律在极端规模下可能因每个潜变量的词元预算次线性而失效。

items.en: Sparse autoencoders provide a promising unsupervised approach for extracting interpretable features from a language model by reconstructing activations from a sparse bottleneck layer. Since language models learn many concepts, autoencoders need to be very large to recover all relevant features. However, studying the properties of autoencoder scaling is difficult due to the need to balance reconstruction and sparsity objectives and the presence of dead latents. We propose using k-sparse autoencoders (Makhzani and Frey, 2013) to directly control sparsity, simplifying tuning and improving the reconstruction-sparsity frontier. Additionally, we find modifications that result in few dead latents, even at the largest scales we tried. Using these techniques, we find clean scaling laws with respect to autoencoder size and sparsity. We also introduce several new metrics for evaluating feature quality based on the recovery of hypothesized features, the explainability of activation patterns, and the sparsity of downstream effects. These metrics all generally improve with autoencoder size. To demonstrate the scalability of our approach, we train a 16 million latent autoencoder on GPT-4 activations for 40 billion tokens. We release code and autoencoders for open-source models, as well as a visualizer.111Our open source code can be found at https://github.com/openai/sparse_autoencoder and our visualizer is hosted at https://openaipublic.blob.core.windows.net/sparse-autoencoder/sae-viewer/index.html
items.zh: 稀疏自编码器提供了一种有前景的无监督方法，通过从稀疏瓶颈层重建激活来从语言模型中提取可解释特征。由于语言模型学习许多概念，自编码器需要非常大才能恢复所有相关特征。然而，由于需要平衡重建和稀疏性目标以及存在死亡潜变量，研究自编码器缩放的性质很困难。我们提出使用k-稀疏自编码器（Makhzani和Frey，2013）直接控制稀疏性，简化调优并改善重建-稀疏性前沿。此外，我们发现了即使在尝试的最大规模下也能导致很少死亡潜变量的修改。使用这些技术，我们发现了关于自编码器大小和稀疏性的清晰缩放定律。我们还引入了几个基于假设特征恢复、激活模式可解释性和下游效应稀疏性的新指标来评估特征质量。这些指标通常随自编码器大小而改善。为了展示我们方法的可扩展性，我们在GPT-4激活上训练了一个1600万潜变量的自编码器，处理了400亿个词元。我们为开源模型发布了代码和自编码器，以及一个可视化工具。

items.en: Sparse autoencoders (SAEs) have shown great promise for finding features (Cunningham et al., 2023; Bricken et al., 2023; Templeton et al., 2024; Goh, 2016) and circuits (Marks et al., 2024) in language models. Unfortunately, they are difficult to train due to their extreme sparsity, so prior work has primarily focused on training relatively small sparse autoencoders on small language models.
items.zh: 稀疏自编码器在语言模型中寻找特征和回路方面显示出巨大潜力。不幸的是，由于极端稀疏性，它们难以训练，因此先前的工作主要集中在小语言模型上训练相对较小的稀疏自编码器。

items.en: We develop a state-of-the-art methodology to reliably train extremely wide and sparse autoencoders with very few dead latents on the activations of any language model. We systematically study the scaling laws with respect to sparsity, autoencoder size, and language model size. To demonstrate that our methodology can scale reliably, we train a 16 million latent autoencoder on GPT-4 (OpenAI, 2023) residual stream activations.
items.zh: 我们开发了一种最先进的方法，能够可靠地在任何语言模型的激活上训练极宽且稀疏的自编码器，且死亡潜变量极少。我们系统研究了关于稀疏性、自编码器大小和语言模型大小的缩放定律。为了展示我们的方法能够可靠扩展，我们在GPT-4残差流激活上训练了一个1600万潜变量的自编码器。

items.en: Because improving reconstruction and sparsity is not the ultimate objective of sparse autoencoders, we also explore better methods for quantifying autoencoder quality. We study quantities corresponding to: whether certain hypothesized features were recovered, whether downstream effects are sparse, and whether features can be explained with both high precision and recall.
items.zh: 由于改善重建和稀疏性并非稀疏自编码器的最终目标，我们还探索了更好的量化自编码器质量的方法。我们研究了对应于以下方面的量：是否恢复了某些假设特征、下游效应是否稀疏、以及特征是否能够以高精度和高召回率解释。

items.en: In Section 2, we describe a state-of-the-art recipe for training sparse autoencoders.
items.zh: 在第2节中，我们描述了训练稀疏自编码器的最先进方法。

items.en: In Section 3, we demonstrate clean scaling laws and scale to large numbers of latents.
items.zh: 在第3节中，我们展示了清晰的缩放定律并扩展到大量潜变量。

items.en: In Section 4, we introduce metrics of latent quality and find larger sparse autoencoders are generally better according to these metrics.
items.zh: 在第4节中，我们引入了潜变量质量的指标，并发现更大的稀疏自编码器通常在这些指标上表现更好。

items.en: We also release code, a full suite of GPT-2 small autoencoders, and a feature visualizer for GPT-2 small autoencoders and the 16 million latent GPT-4 autoencoder.
items.zh: 我们还发布了代码、一套完整的GPT-2小自编码器，以及GPT-2小自编码器和1600万潜变量GPT-4自编码器的特征可视化工具。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Scaling laws for TopK autoencoders trained on GPT-4 activations. (Left) Optimal loss for a fixed compute budget. (Right) Joint scaling law of loss at convergence with fixed number of total latents n𝑛n and fixed sparsity (number of active latents) k𝑘k. Details in Section 3.
items.capZh: 图1：在GPT-4激活上训练的TopK自编码器的缩放定律。（左）固定算力预算下的最优损失。（右）在固定总潜变量数n和固定稀疏性（活跃潜变量数k）下收敛时的联合缩放定律。详见第3节。

items.en: Inputs: We train autoencoders on the residual streams of both GPT-2 small (Radford et al., 2019) and models from a series of increasing sized models sharing GPT-4 architecture and training setup, including GPT-4 itself (OpenAI, 2023)222All presented results either have qualitatively similar results on both GPT-2 small and GPT-4 models, or were only ran on one model class.. We choose a layer near the end of the network, which should contain many features without being specialized for next-token predictions (see Section F.1 for more discussion). Specifically, we use a layer 5656\frac{5}{6} of the way into the network for GPT-4 series models, and we use layer 8 (3434\frac{3}{4} of the way) for GPT-2 small. We use a context length of 64 tokens for all experiments. We subtract the mean over the dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\text{model}} dimension and normalize to all inputs to unit norm, prior to passing to the autoencoder (or computing reconstruction errors).
items.zh: 输入：我们在GPT-2小和一系列共享GPT-4架构和训练设置的不同大小模型（包括GPT-4本身）的残差流上训练自编码器。我们选择网络末端附近的一层，该层应包含许多特征而不会专门用于下一个词预测（更多讨论见第F.1节）。具体来说，对于GPT-4系列模型，我们使用网络5/6处的一层；对于GPT-2小，我们使用第8层（3/4处）。所有实验使用64个词元的上下文长度。在传递给自编码器（或计算重建误差）之前，我们减去d_model维度上的均值并归一化所有输入为单位范数。

items.en: Evaluation: After training, we evaluate autoencoders on sparsity L0, and reconstruction mean-squared error (MSE). We report a normalized version of all MSE numbers, where we divide by a baseline reconstruction error of always predicting the mean activations.
items.zh: 评估：训练后，我们在稀疏性L0和重建均方误差上评估自编码器。我们报告所有MSE数值的归一化版本，即除以始终预测均值激活的基线重建误差。

items.en: Hyperparameters: To simplify analysis, we do not consider learning rate warmup or decay unless otherwise noted. We sweep learning rates at small scales and extrapolate the trend of optimal learning rates for large scale. See Appendix A for other optimization details.
items.zh: 超参数：为简化分析，除非另有说明，我们不考虑学习率预热或衰减。我们在小规模上扫描学习率，并外推大规模的最优学习率趋势。其他优化细节见附录A。

The training loss is defined by ℒ=‖x−x^‖22+λ​‖z‖1ℒsubscriptsuperscriptnorm𝑥^𝑥22𝜆subscriptnorm𝑧1\mathcal{L}=||x-\hat{x}||^{2}_{2}+\lambda||z||_{1}, where ‖x−x^‖22subscriptsuperscriptnorm𝑥^𝑥22||x-\hat{x}||^{2}_{2} is the reconstruction MSE, ‖z‖1subscriptnorm𝑧1||z||_{1} is an L1 penalty promoting sparsity in latent activations z𝑧z, and λ𝜆\lambda is a hyperparameter that needs to be tuned.

items.en: We use a k𝑘k-sparse autoencoder (Makhzani and Frey, 2013), which directly controls the number of active latents by using an activation function (TopK) that only keeps the k𝑘k largest latents, zeroing the rest. The encoder is thus defined as:
items.zh: 我们使用k-稀疏自编码器（Makhzani和Frey，2013），它通过仅保留k个最大潜变量的激活函数（TopK）直接控制活跃潜变量数量，将其他置零。因此编码器定义为：

items.en: and the decoder is unchanged. The training loss is simply ℒ=‖x−x^‖22ℒsubscriptsuperscriptnorm𝑥^𝑥22\mathcal{L}=||x-\hat{x}||^{2}_{2}.
items.zh: 解码器不变。训练损失仅为ℒ=||x-x̂||²₂。

items.en: Using k𝑘k-sparse autoencoders has a number of benefits:
items.zh: 使用k-稀疏自编码器有几个好处：

items.en: It removes the need for the L1 penalty. L1 is an imperfect approximation of L0, and it introduces a bias of shrinking all positive activations toward zero (Section 5.1).
items.zh: 它消除了对L1惩罚的需求。L1是L0的不完美近似，并且引入了将所有正激活向零收缩的偏差（第5.1节）。

items.en: It enables setting the L0 directly, as opposed to tuning an L1 coefficient λ𝜆\lambda, enabling simpler model comparison and rapid iteration. It can also be used in combination with arbitrary activation functions.333In our code, we also apply a ReLU to guarantee activations to be non-negative. However, the training curves are indistinguishable, as the k𝑘k largest activations are almost always positive for reasonable choices of k𝑘k.
items.zh: 它允许直接设置L0，而不是调优L1系数λ，从而简化模型比较和快速迭代。它还可以与任意激活函数结合使用。

items.en: It empirically outperforms baseline ReLU autoencoders on the sparsity-reconstruction frontier (Figure 2a), and this gap increases with scale (Figure 2b).
items.zh: 它在稀疏性-重建前沿上经验性地优于基线ReLU自编码器（图2a），并且这种差距随规模增大而增加（图2b）。

items.en: It increases monosemanticity of random activating examples by effectively clamping small activations to zero (Section 4.3).
items.zh: 它通过将小激活值有效钳制为零，增加了随机激活示例的单义性（第4.3节）。

items.capEn: (a) At a fixed number of latents (n=32768𝑛32768n=32768), TopK has a better reconstruction-sparsity trade off than ReLU and ProLU, and is comparable to Gated.
items.capZh: (a) 在固定潜在变量数量（n=32768）下，TopK 的重建-稀疏性权衡优于 ReLU 和 ProLU，并与 Gated 相当。

items.capEn: (b) At a fixed sparsity level (L0=128subscript𝐿0128L_{0}=128), scaling laws are steeper for TopK than ReLU.555Non-TopK cannot set a precise L0, so we interpolated using a piecewise linear function in log-log space.
items.capZh: (b) 在固定稀疏度水平（L0=128）下，TopK 的缩放定律比 ReLU 更陡峭。⁵⁵非 TopK 无法设定精确的 L0，因此我们使用对数-对数空间中的分段线性函数进行插值。

items.en: Dead latents pose another significant difficulty in autoencoder training. In larger autoencoders, an increasingly large proportion of latents stop activating entirely at some point in training. For example, Templeton et al. (2024) train a 34 million latent autoencoder with only 12 million alive latents, and in our ablations we find up to 90% dead latents666We follow Templeton et al. (2024), and consider a latent dead if it has not activated in 10 million tokens when no mitigations are applied (Figure 15). This results in substantially worse MSE and makes training computationally wasteful. We find two important ingredients for preventing dead latents: we initialize the encoder to the transpose of the decoder, and we use an auxiliary loss that models reconstruction error using the top-kauxsubscript𝑘auxk_{\text{aux}} dead latents (see Section A.2 for more details). Using these techniques, even in our largest (16 million latent) autoencoder only 7% of latents are dead.
items.zh: 死亡潜在变量是自编码器训练中的另一个重大困难。在较大的自编码器中，越来越多的潜在变量在训练过程中完全停止激活。例如，Templeton 等人（2024）训练了一个 3400 万潜在变量的自编码器，但只有 1200 万潜在变量存活，在我们的消融实验中，我们发现高达 90% 的潜在变量死亡⁶⁶我们遵循 Templeton 等人（2024）的定义，如果潜在变量在 1000 万 token 内未激活且未采取缓解措施，则视为死亡（图 15）。这会导致 MSE 显著变差，并使训练在计算上变得浪费。我们发现防止死亡潜在变量的两个关键因素：将编码器初始化解码器的转置，并使用辅助损失通过 top-k_aux 死亡潜在变量建模重建误差（详见附录 A.2）。使用这些技术，即使在我们最大的（1600 万潜在变量）自编码器中，也只有 7% 的潜在变量死亡。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Varying the learning rate jointly with the number of latents. Number of tokens to convergence shown above each point.
items.capZh: 图 3：联合改变学习率和潜在变量数量。每个点上方显示收敛所需的 token 数量。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Larger subject models in the GPT-4 family require more latents to get to the same MSE (k=32𝑘32k=32).
items.capZh: 图 4：GPT-4 系列中更大的主体模型需要更多潜在变量才能达到相同的 MSE（k=32）。

items.en: Due to the broad capabilities of frontier models such as GPT-4, we hypothesize that faithfully representing model state will require large numbers of sparse features. We consider two primary approaches to choose autoencoder size and token budget:
items.zh: 由于 GPT-4 等前沿模型具有广泛的能力，我们假设忠实表示模型状态需要大量稀疏特征。我们考虑两种主要方法来选择自编码器大小和 token 预算：

items.en: Firstly, following Lindsey et al. (2024), we train autoencoders to the optimal MSE given the available compute, disregarding convergence. This method was introduced for pre-training language models (Kaplan et al., 2020; Hoffmann et al., 2022). We find that MSE follows a power law L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) of compute, though the smallest models are off trend (Figure 1).
items.zh: 首先，遵循 Lindsey 等人（2024）的方法，我们在给定可用算力的情况下训练自编码器以达到最优 MSE，而不考虑收敛性。该方法最初用于预训练语言模型（Kaplan 等人，2020；Hoffmann 等人，2022）。我们发现 MSE 遵循算力的幂律 L(C)，尽管最小的模型偏离趋势（图 1）。

items.en: However, latents are the important artifact of training (not reconstruction predictions), whereas for language models we typically care only about token predictions. Comparing MSE across different n𝑛n is thus not a fair comparison — the latents have a looser information bottleneck with larger n𝑛n, so lower MSE is more easily achieved. Thus, this approach is arguably unprincipled for autoencoder training.
items.zh: 然而，潜在变量是训练的重要产物（而非重建预测），而对于语言模型，我们通常只关心 token 预测。因此，比较不同 n 下的 MSE 并非公平比较——更大的 n 意味着潜在变量具有更宽松的信息瓶颈，因此更容易实现更低的 MSE。因此，这种方法对于自编码器训练来说可以说是不合理的。

items.en: We also look at training autoencoders to convergence (within some ϵitalic-ϵ\epsilon). This gives a bound on the best possible reconstruction achievable by our training method if we disregard compute efficiency. In practice, we would ideally train to some intermediate token budget between L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) and L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C).
items.zh: 我们还研究了训练自编码器至收敛（在某个 ε 内）。这给出了如果我们不考虑计算效率，训练方法所能达到的最佳重建上限。在实践中，我们理想情况下会在 L(N) 和 L(C) 之间的某个中间 token 预算下进行训练。

items.en: We find that the largest learning rate that converges scales with 1/n1𝑛1/\sqrt{n} (Figure 4). We also find that the optimal learning rate for L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) is about four times smaller than the optimal learning rate for L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C).
items.zh: 我们发现，能够收敛的最大学习率与 1/√n 成比例缩放（图 4）。我们还发现，L(N) 的最优学习率大约是 L(C) 最优学习率的四分之一。

items.en: We find that the number of tokens to convergence increases as approximately Θ​(n0.6)Θsuperscript𝑛0.6\Theta(n^{0.6}) for GPT-2 small and Θ​(n0.65)Θsuperscript𝑛0.65\Theta(n^{0.65}) for GPT-4 (Figure 11). This must break at some point – if token budget continues to increase sublinearly, the number of tokens each latent receives gradient signal on would approach zero.777One slight complication is that in the infinite width limit, TopK autoencoders with our initialization scheme are actually optimal at init using our init scheme (Section A.1), so this allows for an exponent very slightly less than 111; however, this happens very slowly with n𝑛n so is unlikely to be a major factor at realistic scales.
items.zh: 我们发现，对于 GPT-2 small，收敛所需的 token 数量大约以 Θ(n^0.6) 增加，对于 GPT-4 则以 Θ(n^0.65) 增加（图 11）。这在某个点必然会被打破——如果 token 预算继续亚线性增加，每个潜在变量接收梯度信号的 token 数量将趋近于零。⁷⁷一个轻微的复杂情况是，在无限宽度极限下，使用我们的初始化方案的 TopK 自编码器在初始化时实际上是最优的（附录 A.1），因此这允许指数略小于 1；然而，这随 n 变化非常缓慢，因此在现实规模下不太可能成为主要因素。

items.en: Scaling laws sometimes include an irreducible loss term e𝑒e, such that y=α​xβ+e𝑦𝛼superscript𝑥𝛽𝑒y=\alpha x^{\beta}+e (Henighan et al., 2020). We find that including an irreducible loss term substantially improves the quality of our fits for both L​(C)𝐿𝐶L(C) and L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N).
items.zh: 缩放定律有时包含一个不可约损失项 e，使得 y = αx^β + e（Henighan 等人，2020）。我们发现，包含不可约损失项显著提高了我们对 L(C) 和 L(N) 拟合的质量。

items.en: It was initially not clear to us that there should be a nonzero irreducible loss. One possibility is that there are other kinds of structures in the activations. In the extreme case, unstructured noise in the activations is substantially harder to model and would have an exponent close to zero (Appendix G). Existence of some unstructured noise would explain a bend in the power law.
items.zh: 最初我们并不清楚是否存在非零的不可约损失。一种可能性是激活值中存在其他类型的结构。在极端情况下，激活值中的无结构噪声更难建模，其指数将接近零（附录 G）。存在一些无结构噪声可以解释幂律中的弯曲。

items.en: We find that MSE follows a joint scaling law along the number of latents n𝑛n and the sparsity level k𝑘k (Figure 1b). Because reconstruction becomes trivial as k𝑘k approaches dm​o​d​e​lsubscript𝑑𝑚𝑜𝑑𝑒𝑙d_{model}, this scaling law only holds for the small k𝑘k regime. Our joint scaling law fit on GPT-4 autoencoders is:
items.zh: 我们发现 MSE 遵循关于潜在变量数量 n 和稀疏度水平 k 的联合缩放定律（图 1b）。由于当 k 接近 d_model 时重建变得平凡，该缩放定律仅适用于小 k 区域。我们在 GPT-4 自编码器上的联合缩放定律拟合结果为：

items.en: with α=−0.50𝛼0.50\alpha=-0.50, βk=0.26subscript𝛽𝑘0.26\beta_{k}=0.26, βn=−0.017subscript𝛽𝑛0.017\beta_{n}=-0.017, γ=−0.042𝛾0.042\gamma=-0.042, ζ=−1.32𝜁1.32\zeta=-1.32, and η=−0.085𝜂0.085\eta=-0.085. We can see that γ𝛾\gamma is negative, which means that the scaling law L​(N)𝐿𝑁L(N) gets steeper as k𝑘k increases. η𝜂\eta is negative too, which means that the irreducible loss decreases with k𝑘k.
items.zh: 其中 α = -0.50，β_k = 0.26，β_n = -0.017，γ = -0.042，ζ = -1.32，η = -0.085。我们可以看到 γ 为负，这意味着缩放定律 L(N) 随 k 增加而变得更陡峭。η 也为负，这意味着不可约损失随 k 增加而减小。

items.en: Since language models are likely to keep growing in size, we would also like to understand how sparse autoencoders scale as the subject models get larger. We find that if we hold k𝑘k constant, larger subject models require larger autoencoders to achieve the same MSE, and the exponent is worse (Figure 4).
items.zh: 由于语言模型可能持续增大，我们也希望了解稀疏自编码器如何随主体模型变大而缩放。我们发现，如果保持 k 恒定，更大的主体模型需要更大的自编码器才能达到相同的 MSE，且指数更差（图 4）。

items.capEn: (a) For a fixed number of latents (n=217=131072𝑛superscript217131072n=2^{17}=131072), the downstream-loss/sparsity trade-off is better for TopK autoencoders than for other activation functions.
items.capZh: (a) 对于固定数量的潜在变量（n=2^17=131072），TopK 自编码器的下游损失/稀疏性权衡优于其他激活函数。

items.capEn: (b) For a fixed sparsity level (L0=128subscript𝐿0128L_{0}=128), a given MSE level leads to a lower downstream-loss for TopK autoencoders than for other activation functions.
items.capZh: (b) 对于固定的稀疏度水平（L0=128），给定 MSE 水平下，TopK 自编码器的下游损失低于其他激活函数。

items.en: We demonstrated in Section 3 that our larger autoencoders scale well in terms of MSE and sparsity (see also a comparison of activation functions in Section 5.2). However, the end goal of autoencoders is not to improve the sparsity-reconstruction frontier (which degenerates in the limit888Improving the reconstruction-sparsity frontier is not always strictly better. An infinitely wide maximally sparse (k=1𝑘1k=1) autoencoder can perfectly reconstruct by assigning latents densely in ℝdsuperscriptℝ𝑑\mathbb{R}^{d}, while being completely structure-less and uninteresting.), but rather to find features useful for applications, such as mechanistic interpretability. Therefore, we measure autoencoder quality with the following metrics:
items.zh: 我们在第 3 节中展示了较大的自编码器在 MSE 和稀疏性方面具有良好的缩放性（另见第 5.2 节中激活函数的比较）。然而，自编码器的最终目标不是改善稀疏性-重建前沿（该前沿在极限情况下退化⁸⁸改善重建-稀疏性前沿并不总是更好。一个无限宽的最大稀疏（k=1）自编码器可以通过在 ℝ^d 中密集分配潜在变量来完美重建，同时完全无结构且无趣。），而是找到对应用（如机制可解释性）有用的特征。因此，我们使用以下指标衡量自编码器质量：

items.en: Downstream loss: How good is the language model loss if the residual stream latent is replaced with the autoencoder reconstruction of that latent? (Section 4.1)
items.zh: 下游损失：如果残差流潜变量被自编码器的重建替代，语言模型损失有多好？（第4.1节）

items.en: Probe loss: Do autoencoders recover features that we believe they might have? (Section 4.2)
items.zh: 探针损失：自编码器是否恢复了我们认为可能存在的特征？（第4.2节）

items.en: Explainability: Are there simple explanations that are both necessary and sufficient for the activation of the autoencoder latent? (Section 4.3)
items.zh: 可解释性：是否存在对自编码器潜变量激活既必要又充分的简单解释？（第4.3节）

items.en: Ablation sparsity: Does ablating individual latents have a sparse effect on downstream logits? (Section 4.5)
items.zh: 消融稀疏性：消融单个潜变量是否对下游logits产生稀疏影响？（第4.5节）

items.en: These metrics provide evidence that autoencoders generally get better when the number of total latents increases. The impact of the number of active latents L0 is more complicated. Increasing L0 makes explanations based on token patterns worse, but makes probe loss and ablation sparsity better. All of these trends also break when L0 gets close to dmodelsubscript𝑑modeld_{\text{model}}, a regime in which latents also become quite dense (see Section E.5 for detailed discussion).
items.zh: 这些指标提供了证据，表明自编码器通常随着总潜变量数量的增加而变得更好。活跃潜变量数量L0的影响更为复杂。增加L0会使基于词元模式的解释变差，但使探针损失和消融稀疏性变好。当L0接近d_model时，所有这些趋势也会被打破，此时潜变量也变得相当密集（详细讨论见第E.5节）。

items.en: An autoencoder with non-zero reconstruction error may not succeed at modeling the features most relevant for behavior (Braun et al., 2024). To measure whether we model features relevant to language modeling, we follow prior work (Bills et al., 2023; Cunningham et al., 2023; Bricken et al., 2023; Braun et al., 2024) and consider downstream Kullback-Leibler (KL) divergence and cross-entropy loss.999Because a perfect reconstruction would lead to a non-zero cross-entropy loss, we actually consider the difference to the perfect-autoencoder cross-entropy (“delta cross-entropy”). In both cases, we test an autoencoder by replacing the residual stream by the reconstructed value during the forward pass, and seeing how it affects downstream predictions. We find that k𝑘k-sparse autoencoders improve more on downstream loss than on MSE over prior methods (Figure 5a). We also find that MSE has a clean power law relationship with both KL divergence, and difference of cross entropy loss (Figure 5b), when keeping sparsity L0 fixed and only varying autoencoder size. Note that while this trend is clean for our trained autoencoders, we can observe instances where it breaks such as when modulating k𝑘k at test time (see Section 5.3).
items.zh: 具有非零重建误差的自编码器可能无法成功建模与行为最相关的特征（Braun等人，2024）。为了衡量我们是否建模了与语言建模相关的特征，我们遵循先前的工作（Bills等人，2023；Cunningham等人，2023；Bricken等人，2023；Braun等人，2024），考虑下游Kullback-Leibler（KL）散度和交叉熵损失。由于完美重建会导致非零交叉熵损失，我们实际上考虑与完美自编码器交叉熵的差异（“delta交叉熵”）。在这两种情况下，我们通过在前向传播中用重建值替换残差流来测试自编码器，并观察它如何影响下游预测。我们发现，与先前方法相比，k-稀疏自编码器在下游损失上的改进大于MSE（图5a）。我们还发现，当保持稀疏性L0固定且仅改变自编码器大小时，MSE与KL散度和交叉熵损失差异之间存在清晰的幂律关系（图5b）。注意，虽然这种趋势对我们训练的自编码器是清晰的，但我们可以观察到它被打破的情况，例如在测试时调节k时（见第5.3节）。

items.en: One additional issue is that raw loss numbers alone are difficult to interpret—we would like to know how good it is in an absolute sense. Prior work (Bricken et al., 2023; Rajamanoharan et al., 2024) use the loss of ablating activations to zero as a baseline and report the fraction of loss recovered from that baseline. However, because ablating the residual stream to zero causes very high downstream loss, this means that even very poorly explaining the behavior can result in high scores.101010For completeness, the zero-ablation fidelity metric of our 16M autoencoder is 98.2%.
items.zh: 另一个问题是，仅凭原始损失数字难以解释——我们想知道它在绝对意义上有多好。先前的工作（Bricken等人，2023；Rajamanoharan等人，2024）使用将激活消融为零的损失作为基线，并报告从该基线恢复的损失比例。然而，由于将残差流消融为零会导致非常高的下游损失，这意味着即使对行为的解释非常差，也可能获得高分。作为参考，我们1600万自编码器的零消融保真度指标为98.2%。

items.en: Instead, we believe a more natural metric is to consider the relative amount of pretraining compute needed to train a language model of comparable downstream loss. For example, when our 16 million latent autoencoder is substituted into GPT-4, we get a language modeling loss corresponding to 10% of the pretraining compute of GPT-4.
items.zh: 相反，我们认为更自然的指标是考虑训练一个具有可比下游损失的语言模型所需的预训练算力的相对量。例如，当我们的1600万潜变量自编码器被替换到GPT-4中时，我们得到的语言建模损失对应于GPT-4预训练算力的10%。

full.secZh: 4.2 用一维探针恢复已知特征

items.en: If we expect that a specific feature (e.g sentiment, language identification) should be discovered by a high quality autoencoder, then one metric of autoencoder quality is to check whether these features are present. Based on this intuition, we curated a set of 61 binary classification datasets (details in Table 1). For each task, we train a 1d logistic probe on each latent using the Newton-Raphson method to predict the task, and record the best cross entropy loss (across latents).111111This is similar to the approach of Gurnee et al. (2023), but always using k=1𝑘1k=1, and regressing on autoencoder latents instead of neurons. That is:
items.zh: 如果我们期望一个高质量的自编码器应该发现特定特征（例如情感、语言识别），那么自编码器质量的一个指标就是检查这些特征是否存在。基于这一直觉，我们整理了一组61个二元分类数据集（详情见表1）。对于每个任务，我们在每个潜变量上使用牛顿-拉夫森方法训练一个一维逻辑探针来预测任务，并记录最佳交叉熵损失（跨潜变量）。这类似于Gurnee等人（2023）的方法，但始终使用k=1，并在自编码器潜变量而非神经元上进行回归。即：

items.en: where zisubscript𝑧𝑖z_{i} is the i𝑖ith pre-activation autoencoder latent, and y𝑦y is a binary label.
items.zh: 其中z_i是第i个预激活自编码器潜变量，y是二元标签。

items.en: Results on GPT-2 small are shown in 6(a). We find that probe score increases and then decreases as k𝑘k increases. We find that TopK generally achieves better probe scores than ReLU (Figure 23), and both are substantially better than when using directly residual stream channels. See Figure 32 for results on several GPT-4 autoencoders: we observe that this metric improves throughout training, despite there being no supervised training signal; and we find that it beats a baseline using channels of the residual stream. See Figure 33 for scores broken down by component.
items.zh: GPT-2 small的结果如图6(a)所示。我们发现探针得分随着k的增加先上升后下降。我们发现TopK通常比ReLU获得更好的探针得分（图23），并且两者都明显优于直接使用残差流通道。关于几个GPT-4自编码器的结果见图32：我们观察到该指标在整个训练过程中都在改善，尽管没有监督训练信号；并且我们发现它优于使用残差流通道的基线。按组件划分的得分见图33。

items.en: This metric has the advantage that it is computationally cheap. However, it also has a major limitation, which is that it leans on strong assumptions about what kinds of features are natural.
items.zh: 该指标的优点是计算成本低。然而，它也有一个主要局限性，即它依赖于关于哪些特征是自然的强假设。

items.en: Anecdotally, our autoencoders find many features that have quickly recognizable patterns that suggest explanations when viewing random activations (Section E.1). However, this can create an “illusion” of interpretability (Bolukbasi et al., 2021), where explanations are overly broad, and thus have good recall but poor precision. For example, Bills et al. (2023) propose an automated interpretability score which disproportionately depends on recall. They find a feature activating at the end of the phrase “don’t stop” or “can’t stop”, but an explanation activating on all instances of “stop” achieves a high interpretability score. As we scale autoencoders and the features get sparser and more specific, this kind of failure becomes more severe.
items.zh: 根据经验，我们的自编码器发现许多特征具有快速可识别的模式，这些模式在查看随机激活时暗示了解释（第E.1节）。然而，这可能会产生一种“可解释性错觉”（Bolukbasi等人，2021），其中解释过于宽泛，因此召回率高但精确率低。例如，Bills等人（2023）提出了一种自动可解释性得分，该得分不成比例地依赖于召回率。他们发现一个特征在短语“don’t stop”或“can’t stop”的末尾激活，但一个在所有“stop”实例上激活的解释获得了很高的可解释性得分。随着我们扩展自编码器，特征变得更稀疏和更具体，这种失败变得更加严重。

items.en: Unfortunately, precision is extremely expensive to evaluate when the simulations are using GPT-4 as in Bills et al. (2023). As an initial exploration, we focus on an improved version of Neuron to Graph (N2G) (Foote et al., 2023), a substantially less expressive but much cheaper method that outputs explanations in the form of collections of n-grams with wildcards. In the future, we would like to explore ways to make it more tractable to approximate precision for arbitrary English explanations.
items.zh: 不幸的是，当模拟使用GPT-4时，精确率的评估极其昂贵（如Bills等人，2023）。作为初步探索，我们专注于Neuron to Graph（N2G）的改进版本（Foote等人，2023），这是一种表达能力较弱但成本低得多的方法，它输出以带有通配符的n-gram集合形式的解释。未来，我们希望探索使任意英语解释的精确率近似更易处理的方法。

items.en: To construct a N2G explanation, we start with some sequences that activate the latent. For each one, we find the shortest suffix that still activates the latent.121212with at least half the original activation strength We then check whether any position in the n-gram can be replaced by a padding token, to insert wildcard tokens. We also check whether the explanation should be dependent on absolute position by checking whether inserting a padding token at the beginning matters. We use a random sample of up to 16 nonzero activations to build the graph, and another 16 as true positives for computing recall.
items.zh: 为了构建N2G解释，我们从一些激活该潜变量的序列开始。对于每个序列，我们找到仍然激活该潜变量的最短后缀（至少具有原始激活强度的一半）。然后我们检查n-gram中的任何位置是否可以被填充词元替换，以插入通配符词元。我们还通过检查在开头插入填充词元是否重要来检查解释是否应依赖于绝对位置。我们使用最多16个非零激活的随机样本来构建图，另外16个作为计算召回率的真阳性。

items.en: Results for GPT-2 small are found in 25(a) and 25(b). Note that dense token patterns are trivial to explain, thus n=2048,k=512formulae-sequence𝑛2048𝑘512n=2048,k=512 latents are easy to explain on average since many latents activate extremely densely (see Section E.5)131313This highlights an issue with our precision/recall metrics, which care only about binarized values. We also propose a more expensive metric which uses simulated values Section 4.4 and addresses this issue. . In general, autoencoders with more total latents and fewer active latents are easiest to model with N2G.
items.zh: GPT-2 small的结果见图25(a)和25(b)。注意，密集的词元模式很容易解释，因此n=2048,k=512的潜变量平均而言很容易解释，因为许多潜变量激活极其密集（见第E.5节）。这突显了我们精确率/召回率指标的一个问题，该指标只关心二值化值。我们还提出了一个更昂贵的指标，该指标使用模拟值（第4.4节）并解决了这个问题。总的来说，具有更多总潜变量和更少活跃潜变量的自编码器最容易用N2G建模。

items.en: We also obtain evidence that TopK models have fewer spurious positive activations than their ReLU counterparts. N2G explanations have significantly better recall (>1.5x) and only slightly worse precision (>0.9x) for TopK models with the same n𝑛n (resulting in better F1 scores) and similar L0 (Figure 24).
items.zh: 我们还获得证据表明，TopK模型比其ReLU对应模型具有更少的虚假正激活。对于相同n和相似L0的TopK模型，N2G解释具有显著更好的召回率（>1.5倍）和仅略差的精确率（>0.9倍）（导致更好的F1分数）（图24）。

items.en: When our goal is for a model’s activations to be interpretable, one question we can ask is: how much performance do we sacrifice if we use only the parts of the model that we can interpret?
items.zh: 当我们的目标是使模型的激活可解释时，我们可以问的一个问题是：如果我们只使用模型中我们可以解释的部分，我们会牺牲多少性能？

items.en: Our downstream loss metric measures how much of the performance we’re capturing (but our features could be uninterpretable), and our explanation based metric measures how monosemantic our features are (but they might not explain most of the model). This suggests combining our downstream loss and explanation metrics, by using our explanations to simulate autoencoder latents, and then checking downstream loss after decoding. This metric also has the advantage that it values both recall and precision in a way that is principled, and also values recall more for latents that activate more densely.
items.zh: 我们的下游损失指标衡量我们捕获了多少性能（但我们的特征可能不可解释），而基于解释的指标衡量我们的特征有多单义（但它们可能无法解释模型的大部分）。这表明结合我们的下游损失和解释指标，通过使用我们的解释来模拟自编码器潜在变量，然后在解码后检查下游损失。该指标还有一个优点，即它以原则性的方式同时重视召回率和精确度，并且对于激活更密集的潜在变量更重视召回率。

items.en: We tried this with N2G explanations. N2G produces a simulated value based on the node in the trie, but we scale this value to minimize variance explained. Specifically, we compute E​[s​a]/E​[s2]𝐸delimited-[]𝑠𝑎𝐸delimited-[]superscript𝑠2E[sa]/E[s^{2}], where s𝑠s is the simulated value and a𝑎a is the true value, and we estimate this quantity over a training set of tokens. Results for GPT-2 are shown in Figure 8. We find that we can explain more of GPT-2 small than just explaining bigrams, and that larger and sparser autoencoders result in better downstream loss.
items.zh: 我们尝试了使用N2G解释。N2G基于字典树中的节点生成模拟值，但我们缩放该值以最小化解释的方差。具体来说，我们计算E[sa]/E[s^2]，其中s是模拟值，a是真实值，并在一个训练集上估计该量。GPT-2的结果如图8所示。我们发现，我们可以解释GPT-2 small的更多部分，而不仅仅是解释二元组，并且更大、更稀疏的自编码器会导致更好的下游损失。

items.capEn: Figure 8: Downstream loss on GPT-2 with various residual stream ablations at layer 8. N2G explanations of autoencoder latents improves downstream loss with larger n𝑛n and smaller k𝑘k.
items.capZh: 图8：在GPT-2第8层进行各种残差流消融时的下游损失。自编码器潜在变量的N2G解释通过更大的n和更小的k改善了下游损失。

items.en: If the underlying computations learned by a language model are sparse, one hypothesis is that natural features are not only sparse in terms of activations, but also in terms of downstream effects (Olah et al., 2024). Anecdotally, we observed that ablation effects often are interpretable (see our visualizer). Therefore, we developed a metric to measure the sparsity of downstream effects on the output logits.
items.zh: 如果语言模型学习到的底层计算是稀疏的，一个假设是自然特征不仅在激活方面是稀疏的，在下游效应方面也是稀疏的（Olah等人，2024）。根据经验，我们观察到消融效应通常是可解释的（参见我们的可视化工具）。因此，我们开发了一个指标来衡量输出logits上下游效应的稀疏性。

items.en: At a particular token index, we obtain the latents at the residual stream, and proceed to ablate each autoencoder latent one by one, and compare the resulting logits before and after ablation. This process leads to V𝑉V logit differences per ablation and affected token, where V𝑉V is the size of the token vocabulary. Because a constant difference at every logit does not affect the post-softmax probabilities, we subtract at each token the median logit difference value. Finally, we concatenate these vectors together across some set of T𝑇T future tokens (at the ablated index or later) to obtain a vector of V⋅T⋅𝑉𝑇V\cdot T total numbers. We then measure the sparsity of this vector via (L1L2)2superscriptsubscriptL1subscriptL22(\frac{\text{L}_{1}}{\text{L}_{2}})^{2}, which corresponds to an “effective number of vocab tokens affected”. We normalize by V⋅T⋅𝑉𝑇V\cdot T to have a fraction between 0 and 1, with smaller values corresponding to sparser effects.
items.zh: 在特定的词元索引处，我们获取残差流处的潜在变量，然后逐个消融每个自编码器潜在变量，并比较消融前后的logits。这个过程导致每个消融和受影响的词元有V个logit差异，其中V是词元词汇表的大小。由于每个logit上的恒定差异不影响softmax后的概率，我们在每个词元处减去logit差异的中位数。最后，我们将这些向量在一组T个未来词元（在消融索引处或之后）上连接起来，得到一个包含V·T个数字的向量。然后我们通过(L1/L2)^2测量该向量的稀疏性，这对应于“受影响的词汇词元的有效数量”。我们除以V·T以得到0到1之间的分数，较小的值对应更稀疏的效应。

items.en: We perform this for various autoencoders trained on the post-MLP residual stream at layer 8 in GPT-2 small, with T=16𝑇16T=16. Results are shown in 6(b). Promisingly, models trained with larger k𝑘k have latents with sparser effects. However, the trend reverses at k=512𝑘512k=512, indicating that as k𝑘k approaches dmodel=768subscript𝑑model768d_{\text{model}}=768, the autoencoder learns latents with less interpretable effects. Note that latents are sparse in an absolute sense, having a (L1L2)2superscriptsubscriptL1subscriptL22(\frac{\text{L}_{1}}{\text{L}_{2}})^{2} of 10-14% , whereas ablating residual stream channels gives 60% (slightly better than the theoretical value of ∼2πsimilar-toabsent2𝜋\sim\frac{2}{\pi} for random vectors).
items.zh: 我们对在GPT-2 small第8层MLP后残差流上训练的各种自编码器执行此操作，T=16。结果显示在图6(b)中。有希望的是，使用更大k训练的模型具有更稀疏效应的潜在变量。然而，在k=512处趋势逆转，表明当k接近d_model=768时，自编码器学习到的潜在变量具有较不可解释的效应。注意，潜在变量在绝对意义上是稀疏的，其(L1/L2)^2为10-14%，而消融残差流通道给出60%（略好于随机向量的理论值~2/π）。

items.en: A major drawback of the L1 penalty is that it tends to shrink all activations toward zero (Tibshirani, 1996). Our proposed TopK activation function prevents activation shrinkage, as it entirely removes the need for an L1 penalty. To empirically measure the magnitude of activation shrinkage, we consider whether different (and potentially larger) activations would result in better reconstruction given a fixed decoder. We first run the encoder to obtain a set of activated latents, save the sparsity mask, and then optimize only the nonzero values to minimize MSE.141414unlike the “inference-time optimization” procedure in Nanda et al. (2024) This refinement method has been proposed multiple times such as in k𝑘k-SVD (Aharon et al., 2006), the relaxed Lasso (Meinshausen, 2007), or ITI (Maleki, 2009). We solve for the optimal activations with a positivity constraint using projected gradient descent.
items.zh: L1惩罚的一个主要缺点是它倾向于将所有激活向零收缩（Tibshirani, 1996）。我们提出的TopK激活函数防止了激活收缩，因为它完全消除了对L1惩罚的需求。为了经验性地测量激活收缩的幅度，我们考虑在固定解码器的情况下，不同（可能更大）的激活是否会带来更好的重建。我们首先运行编码器以获得一组激活的潜在变量，保存稀疏掩码，然后仅优化非零值以最小化MSE。这种细化方法已被多次提出，例如在k-SVD（Aharon等人，2006）、松弛Lasso（Meinshausen, 2007）或ITI（Maleki, 2009）中。我们使用投影梯度下降在正性约束下求解最优激活。

items.en: This refinement procedure tends to increase activations in ReLU models on average, but not in TopK models (Figure 9a), which indicates that TopK is not impacted by activation shrinkage. The magnitude of the refinement is also smaller for TopK models than for ReLU models. In both ReLU and TopK models, the refinement procedure noticeably improves the reconstruction MSE (Figure 9b), and the downstream next-token-prediction cross-entropy (Figure 9c). However, this refinement only closes part of the gap between ReLU and TopK models.
items.zh: 这种细化过程倾向于平均增加ReLU模型中的激活，但不会增加TopK模型中的激活（图9a），这表明TopK不受激活收缩的影响。细化幅度对于TopK模型也比ReLU模型小。在ReLU和TopK模型中，细化过程显著改善了重建MSE（图9b）和下游下一个词预测交叉熵（图9c）。然而，这种细化仅缩小了ReLU和TopK模型之间的一部分差距。

items.capEn: Figure 9: Latent activations can be refined to improve reconstruction from a frozen set of latents. For ReLU autoencoders, the refinement is biased toward positive values, consistent with compensating for the shrinkage caused by the L1 penalty. For TopK autoencoders, the refinement is not biased, and also smaller in magnitude. The refinement only closes part of the gap between ReLU and TopK.
items.capZh: 图9：潜在激活可以被细化以改善从固定潜在变量集的重建。对于ReLU自编码器，细化偏向正值，这与补偿L1惩罚引起的收缩一致。对于TopK自编码器，细化没有偏差，且幅度更小。细化仅缩小了ReLU和TopK之间的一部分差距。

full.secZh: 5.2 与其他激活函数的比较

items.en: Other recent works on sparse autoencoders have proposed different ways to address the L1 activation shrinkage, and Pareto improve the L0-MSE frontier (Wright and Sharkey, 2024; Taggart, 2024; Rajamanoharan et al., 2024). Wright and Sharkey (2024) propose to fine-tune a scaling parameter per latent, to correct for the L1 activation shrinkage. In Gated sparse autoencoders (Rajamanoharan et al., 2024), the selection of which latents are active is separate from the estimation of the activation magnitudes. This separation allows autoencoders to better estimate the activation magnitude, and avoid the L1 activation shrinkage. Another approach is to replace the ReLU activation function with a ProLU (Taggart, 2024) (also known as TRec (Konda et al., 2014), or JumpReLU (Erichson et al., 2019)), which sets all values below a positive threshold to zero Jθ​(x)=x⋅𝟏(x>θ)subscript𝐽𝜃𝑥⋅𝑥subscript1𝑥𝜃J_{\theta}(x)=x\cdot\mathbf{1}_{(x>\theta)}. Because the parameter θ𝜃\theta is non-differentiable, it requires a approximate gradient such as a ReLU equivalent (ProLU-ReLU) or a straight-through estimator (ProLU-STE) (Taggart, 2024).
items.zh: 其他关于稀疏自编码器的近期工作提出了不同的方法来解决L1激活收缩，并帕累托改进L0-MSE前沿（Wright和Sharkey, 2024; Taggart, 2024; Rajamanoharan等人，2024）。Wright和Sharkey（2024）提出微调每个潜在变量的缩放参数，以纠正L1激活收缩。在门控稀疏自编码器中（Rajamanoharan等人，2024），选择哪些潜在变量是活跃的与估计激活幅度是分开的。这种分离使自编码器能够更好地估计激活幅度，并避免L1激活收缩。另一种方法是用ProLU（Taggart, 2024）（也称为TRec（Konda等人，2014）或JumpReLU（Erichson等人，2019））替换ReLU激活函数，该函数将所有低于正阈值的值设为零：J_θ(x)=x·1_{(x>θ)}。由于参数θ不可微，它需要近似梯度，例如ReLU等价物（ProLU-ReLU）或直通估计器（ProLU-STE）（Taggart, 2024）。

items.en: We compared these different approaches in terms of reconstruction MSE, number of active latents L0, and downstream cross-entropy loss (Figure 2 and 5). We find that they significantly improve the reconstruction-sparsity Pareto frontier, with TopK having the best performance overall.
items.zh: 我们比较了这些不同方法在重建MSE、活跃潜在变量数L0和下游交叉熵损失方面的表现（图2和图5）。我们发现它们显著改善了重建-稀疏性帕累托前沿，其中TopK整体性能最佳。

items.capEn: Figure 10: Sparsity levels can be changed at test time by replacing the activation function with either TopK(k𝑘k) or JumpReLU(θ𝜃\theta), for a given value k𝑘k or θ𝜃\theta. TopK tends to overfit to the value of k𝑘k used during training, but using Multi-TopK improves generalization to larger k𝑘k.
items.capZh: 图10：通过在测试时用TopK(k)或JumpReLU(θ)替换激活函数，可以改变稀疏性水平，给定值k或θ。TopK倾向于过拟合训练时使用的k值，但使用Multi-TopK改善了对更大k的泛化。

items.en: In a progressive code, a partial transmission still allows reconstructing the signal with reasonable fidelity (Skodras et al., 2001). For autoencoders, learning a progressive code means that ordering latents by activation magnitude gives a way to progressively recover the original vector. To study this property, we replace the autoencoder activation function (after training) by a TopK(k′superscript𝑘′k^{\prime}) activation function where k′superscript𝑘′k^{\prime} is different than during training. We then evaluate each value of k′superscript𝑘′k^{\prime} by placing it in the L0-MSE plane (Figure 10).
items.zh: 在渐进编码中，部分传输仍然允许以合理的保真度重建信号（Skodras等人，2001）。对于自编码器，学习渐进编码意味着按激活幅度排序潜在变量提供了一种逐步恢复原始向量的方法。为了研究这一特性，我们在训练后用TopK(k')激活函数替换自编码器激活函数，其中k'与训练时不同。然后我们通过将每个k'值放在L0-MSE平面中评估（图10）。

items.en: We find that training with TopK only gives a progressive code up to the value of k𝑘k used during training. MSE keeps improving for values slightly over k𝑘k (a result also described in (Makhzani and Frey, 2013)), then gets substantially worse as k′superscript𝑘′k^{\prime} increases (note that the effect on downstream loss is more muted). This can be interpreted as some sort of overfitting to the value k𝑘k.
items.zh: 我们发现，使用TopK训练仅在训练时使用的k值范围内提供渐进编码。MSE在略高于k的值上持续改善（这一结果也在（Makhzani和Frey, 2013）中描述），然后随着k'的增加而显著变差（注意对下游损失的影响更为缓和）。这可以解释为对k值的某种过拟合。

items.en: To mitigate this issue, we sum multiple TopK losses with different values of k𝑘k (Multi-TopK). For example, using ℒ​(k)+ℒ​(4​k)/8ℒ𝑘ℒ4𝑘8\mathcal{L}(k)+\mathcal{L}(4k)/8 is enough to obtain a progressive code over all k′superscript𝑘′k^{\prime} (note however that training with Multi-TopK does slightly worse than TopK at k𝑘k). Training with the baseline ReLU only gives a progressive code up to a value that corresponds to using all positive latents.
items.zh: 为了缓解这个问题，我们求和多个具有不同k值的TopK损失（Multi-TopK）。例如，使用L(k)+L(4k)/8足以在所有k'上获得渐进编码（但注意，使用Multi-TopK训练在k处比TopK稍差）。使用基线ReLU训练仅在对应于使用所有正潜在变量的值范围内提供渐进编码。

items.en: At test time, the activation function can also be replaced by a JumpReLU activation, which activates above a fixed threshold θ𝜃\theta, Jθ​(x)=x⋅𝟏(x>θ)subscript𝐽𝜃𝑥⋅𝑥subscript1𝑥𝜃J_{\theta}(x)=x\cdot\mathbf{1}_{(x>\theta)}. In contrast to TopK, JumpReLU leads to a selection of active latents where the number of active latents can vary across tokens. Results for replacing the activation function at test-time with a JumpReLU are shown in dashed lines in Figure 10.
items.zh: 在测试时，激活函数也可以替换为JumpReLU激活，该激活在固定阈值θ以上激活：J_θ(x)=x·1_{(x>θ)}。与TopK相比，JumpReLU导致活跃潜在变量的选择，其中活跃潜在变量的数量可以跨词元变化。在测试时用JumpReLU替换激活函数的结果如图10中的虚线所示。

items.en: For autoencoders trained with TopK, the test-time TopK and JumpReLU curves are superimposed only for values corresponding to an L0 below the training L0, otherwise the JumpReLU activation is worse than the TopK activation. This discrepancy disappears with Multi-TopK, where both curves are nearly superimposed, which means that the model can be used with either a fixed or a dynamic number of latents per token without loss in reconstruction. The two curves are also superimposed for autoencoders trained with ReLU. Interestingly, it is sometimes more efficient to train a ReLU model with a low L1 penalty and to use a TopK or JumpReLU at test time, than to use a higher L1 penalty that would give a similar sparsity level (a result independently described in Nanda et al. (2024)).
items.zh: 对于使用TopK训练的自编码器，测试时的TopK和JumpReLU曲线仅在对应于L0低于训练L0的值上重叠，否则JumpReLU激活比TopK激活差。这种差异在使用Multi-TopK时消失，两条曲线几乎重叠，这意味着模型可以在不损失重建的情况下使用固定或动态数量的每词元潜在变量。对于使用ReLU训练的自编码器，两条曲线也重叠。有趣的是，有时使用低L1惩罚训练ReLU模型并在测试时使用TopK或JumpReLU，比使用更高L1惩罚以获得类似稀疏性水平更有效（这一结果在Nanda等人（2024）中独立描述）。

items.en: We believe many improvements can be made to our autoencoders.
items.zh: 我们相信我们的自编码器可以做出许多改进。

items.en: TopK forces every token to use exactly k𝑘k latents, which is likely suboptimal. Ideally we would constrain 𝔼​[L0]𝔼delimited-[]subscript𝐿0\mathbb{E}[L_{0}] rather than L0subscript𝐿0L_{0}.
items.zh: TopK强制每个词元恰好使用k个潜在变量，这可能是次优的。理想情况下，我们应该约束E[L0]而不是L0。

items.en: The optimization can likely be greatly improved, for example with learning rate scheduling,151515Anecdotally, we also found that lowering learning rates helped with decreasing dead latents. better optimizers, and better aux losses for preventing dead latents.
items.zh: 优化可能可以大大改进，例如通过学习率调度、更好的优化器以及更好的辅助损失来防止死潜在变量。

items.en: Much more could be done to understand what metrics best track relevance to downstream applications, and to study those applications themselves. Applications include: finding vectors for steering behavior, doing anomaly detection, identifying circuits, and more.
items.zh: 可以做更多工作来理解哪些指标最能跟踪与下游应用的相关性，并研究这些应用本身。应用包括：寻找用于行为引导的向量、进行异常检测、识别电路等。

items.en: We’re excited about work in the direction of combining MoE (Shazeer et al., 2017) and autoencoders, which would substantially improve the asymptotic cost of autoencoder training, and enable much larger autoencoders.
items.zh: 我们对结合MoE（Shazeer等人，2017）和自编码器的工作方向感到兴奋，这将显著改善自编码器训练的渐近成本，并实现更大的自编码器。

items.en: A large fraction of the random activations of features we find, especially in GPT-4, are not yet adequately monosemantic. We believe that with improved techniques and greater scale161616both in number of latents and in training tokens this is potentially surmountable.
items.zh: 我们发现的大量随机激活特征，尤其是在GPT-4中，尚未充分实现单语义性。我们相信，通过改进技术和更大的规模（包括潜在变量数量和训练token数量），这是可以克服的。

items.en: Our probe based metric is quite noisy, which could be improved by having a greater breadth of tasks and higher quality tasks.
items.zh: 我们基于探针的指标噪声较大，可以通过增加任务的广度和提高任务质量来改进。

items.en: While we use n2g for its computational efficiency, it is only able to capture very simple patterns. We believe there is a lot of room for improvement in terms of more expressive explanation methods that are also cheap enough to simulate to estimate explanation precision.
items.zh: 虽然我们使用n2g因其计算效率，但它只能捕捉非常简单的模式。我们相信，在更具表达力的解释方法方面有很大的改进空间，这些方法也足够廉价以模拟来估计解释精度。

items.en: A context length of 64 tokens is potentially too few tokens to exhibit the most interesting behaviors of GPT-4.
items.zh: 64个token的上下文长度可能太短，无法展示GPT-4最有趣的行为。

items.en: Sparse coding on an over-complete dictionary was introduced by Mallat and Zhang (1993). Olshausen and Field (1996) refined the idea by proposing to learn the dictionary from the data, without supervision. This approach has been particularly influential in image processing, as seen for example in (Mairal et al., 2014). Later, Hinton and Salakhutdinov (2006) proposed the autoencoder architecture to perform dimensionality reduction. Combining these concepts, sparse autoencoders were developed (Lee et al., 2007; Le et al., 2013; Konda et al., 2014) to train autoencoders with sparsity priors, such as the L1 penalty, to extract sparse features. Makhzani and Frey (2013) refined this concept by introducing k𝑘k-sparse autoencoders, which use a TopK activation function instead of the L1 penalty. Makelov et al. (2024) evaluates autoencoders using a metric that measures recovery of features from previously discovered circuits.
items.zh: 过完备字典上的稀疏编码由Mallat和Zhang（1993）提出。Olshausen和Field（1996）通过提出从数据中无监督学习字典来完善这一思想。这种方法在图像处理中特别有影响力，例如参见（Mairal等人，2014）。后来，Hinton和Salakhutdinov（2006）提出了自编码器架构来进行降维。结合这些概念，稀疏自编码器被开发出来（Lee等人，2007；Le等人，2013；Konda等人，2014），以训练具有稀疏先验（如L1惩罚）的自编码器，从而提取稀疏特征。Makhzani和Frey（2013）通过引入k-稀疏自编码器完善了这一概念，该自编码器使用TopK激活函数代替L1惩罚。Makelov等人（2024）使用一种度量来评估自编码器，该度量衡量从先前发现的电路中恢复特征的能力。

items.en: More recently, sparse autoencoders were applied to language models (Yun et al., 2021; Lee Sharkey, 2022; Bricken et al., 2023; Cunningham et al., 2023), and multiple sparse autoencoders were trained on small open-source language models (Marks, 2023; Bloom, 2024; Mossing et al., 2024). Marks et al. (2024) showed that the resulting features from sparse autoencoders can find sparse circuits in language models. Wright and Sharkey (2024) pointed out that sparse autoencoders are subject to activation shrinking from L1 penalties, a property of L1 penalties first described in Tibshirani (1996). Taggart (2024) and Rajamanoharan et al. (2024) proposed to use different activation functions to address activation shrinkage in sparse autoencoders. Braun et al. (2024) proposed to train sparse autoencoders on downstream KL instead of reconstruction MSE.
items.zh: 最近，稀疏自编码器被应用于语言模型（Yun等人，2021；Lee Sharkey，2022；Bricken等人，2023；Cunningham等人，2023），并在小型开源语言模型上训练了多个稀疏自编码器（Marks，2023；Bloom，2024；Mossing等人，2024）。Marks等人（2024）表明，稀疏自编码器产生的特征可以在语言模型中找到稀疏电路。Wright和Sharkey（2024）指出，稀疏自编码器会受到L1惩罚导致的激活收缩，这是Tibshirani（1996）首次描述的L1惩罚的一个特性。Taggart（2024）和Rajamanoharan等人（2024）提出使用不同的激活函数来解决稀疏自编码器中的激活收缩问题。Braun等人（2024）提出在下游KL散度上训练稀疏自编码器，而不是重建MSE。

items.en: Kaplan et al. (2020) studied scaling laws for language models which examine how loss varies with various hyperparameters. Clark et al. (2022) explore scaling laws related to sparsity using a bilinear fit. Lindsey et al. (2024) studied scaling laws specifically for autoencoders, defining the loss as a specific balance of reconstruction and sparsity (rather than simply reconstruction, while holding sparsity fixed).
items.zh: Kaplan等人（2020）研究了语言模型的缩放定律，探讨损失如何随各种超参数变化。Clark等人（2022）使用双线性拟合探索了与稀疏性相关的缩放定律。Lindsey等人（2024）专门研究了自编码器的缩放定律，将损失定义为重建和稀疏性的特定平衡（而不是简单地重建，同时保持稀疏性固定）。
